from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class Order:
    id: int
    total: float
    status: str
    discount: float = 0
    requires_approval: bool = False


def apply_pricing_rules(order: Order) -> Order:
    if order.total > 1000:
        order.status = "pending_review"
        order.requires_approval = True
    elif order.total > 500:
        order.discount = order.total * 0.05
        order.status = "processing"
    else:
        order.status = "processing"
    return order


def serialize_order(order: Order) -> dict:
    return {
        "id": order.id,
        "total": order.total,
        "status": order.status,
        "discount": order.discount,
        "requires_approval": order.requires_approval,
    }


def create_order_response(order: Order) -> dict:
    order = apply_pricing_rules(order)
    return serialize_order(order)
